scripts.migrate: node ../services/auth-service/src/config/migrate.js && node ../services/fields-service/src/config/migrate.js && cd ../services/booking-payment-service && php artisan db:setup
scripts.setup: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently "node index.js" "cd ../services/auth-service && node src/index.js" "cd ../services/fields-service && node src/index.js" "cd ../services/booking-payment-service && php artisan serve --port=3003"
